message:
fix: pass --root-only to bd mol wisp create in autoSpawnPatrol

Patrol wisps should only create the root issue — steps are read inline
at prime time, not tracked as individual DB rows. Belt-and-suspenders
with the bd-side fix that defaults wisps to root-only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
